setup.description: Configure a shared sessions repo, safe default-deny policy, and global Claude SessionEnd hook; migrate legacy local hooks.

policy.description: Whitelist, blacklist, or explain repository-specific automatic transcript export decisions.

hook.description: Install, inspect, migrate, or remove the global Claude Code SessionEnd transcript hook.

status.description: Diagnose session config, repository policy, hook installation, and stored transcript state.

share.description: List local Claude sessions or explicitly export one transcript to the shared repository.

sync.description: Push or pull shared session transcript commits without merge commits.

view.description: Start, stop, or rebuild AgentsView for shared team session transcripts.
